outlets.name: TechCrunch
outlets.bias_notes: Startup/VC-friendly coverage; tends toward optimism on tech progress

outlets.name: Wired
outlets.bias_notes: Long-form, critical lens; often skeptical of hype

outlets.name: The Verge
outlets.bias_notes: Consumer-focused, skeptical of big tech overreach

outlets.name: MIT Technology Review
outlets.bias_notes: Academic credibility; balanced between hype and skepticism; some paywalled content

outlets.name: Ars Technica
outlets.bias_notes: Technical audience; rigorous fact-checking; critical of corporate spin

outlets.name: VentureBeat
outlets.bias_notes: Enterprise/B2B focus; covers commercial AI heavily

outlets.name: Bloomberg Technology
outlets.bias_notes: Finance-first lens; excellent for investor perspective; paywall heavy

outlets.name: Wall Street Journal Technology
outlets.bias_notes: Business/conservative financial lens; paywalled; strong enterprise scoops

outlets.name: New York Times Technology
outlets.bias_notes: Center-left; narrative-heavy; strong investigative AI pieces

outlets.name: Reuters Technology
outlets.bias_notes: Wire service neutrality; global scope; strong on regulatory/policy beats

outlets.name: The Guardian Technology
outlets.bias_notes: Progressive/left-of-center; strong on AI rights and harms; open content API available

outlets.name: Financial Times - Technology
outlets.bias_notes: Finance/business focus; UK/EU perspective; paywall; excellent board-level AI coverage

outlets.name: CNBC Technology
outlets.bias_notes: Markets/business focus; tends toward bullish framing

outlets.name: IEEE Spectrum
outlets.bias_notes: Engineering community focus; technically rigorous; minimal hype

outlets.name: Science Magazine - AI Coverage
outlets.bias_notes: Peer-reviewed credibility; conservative about AGI claims

outlets.name: Nature - AI/Machine Intelligence
outlets.bias_notes: Highest scientific credibility; slower cadence; research announcements

outlets.name: Fast Company - Tech
outlets.bias_notes: Business innovation focus; optimistic/forward-looking tone

outlets.name: ZDNet
outlets.bias_notes: B2B/enterprise IT focus; practical/implementation bent

outlets.name: Washington Post - Technology
outlets.bias_notes: Center-left; strong DC/regulatory lens; Jeff Bezos ownership noted

outlets.name: Associated Press - Technology
outlets.bias_notes: Wire service neutrality; global scope; factual/minimal analysis

outlets.name: AI News (aitnews.com)
outlets.bias_notes: AI-positive focus; primarily aggregates and summarizes

outlets.name: AI Business
outlets.bias_notes: B2B focus; industry-friendly tone

outlets.name: Unite.AI
outlets.bias_notes: Generally positive; strong on summarizing academic papers

outlets.name: Synced Review
outlets.bias_notes: Bridge between Chinese and Western AI research communities

outlets.name: The Gradient
outlets.bias_notes: Academic/researcher perspective; thoughtful analysis

outlets.name: Analytics India Magazine
outlets.bias_notes: India-centric; career and practitioner focus

outlets.name: KDnuggets
outlets.bias_notes: Practitioner community; tutorials and surveys

outlets.name: Towards Data Science (Medium)
outlets.bias_notes: Community contributor model; quality varies; practitioner-heavy

outlets.name: AI Alignment Forum
outlets.bias_notes: Safety-focused community; assumes AI risk is real; technical depth high

outlets.name: LessWrong
outlets.bias_notes: Rationalist community; strong AI-risk prior; technically sophisticated

outlets.name: AIMultiple
outlets.bias_notes: Research/analyst tone; enterprise decision-maker audience

outlets.name: Emerj AI Research
outlets.bias_notes: Business/executive audience; curated and analytical

outlets.name: Last Week in AI
outlets.bias_notes: Balanced, curated digest; good signal-to-noise ratio

outlets.name: Ben's Bites
outlets.bias_notes: AI-positive; startup-friendly; light but comprehensive daily coverage

outlets.name: TLDR AI
outlets.bias_notes: Brevity-focused; practitioner audience; tech-positive

outlets.name: The Rundown AI
outlets.bias_notes: Practitioner-focused; tools and implementation emphasis

outlets.name: arXiv - AI/ML Preprints
outlets.bias_notes: Preprint server; not peer-reviewed; ground zero for AI research announcements

outlets.name: OpenAI Blog
outlets.bias_notes: Official company source; PR-managed; watch for spin on safety narratives

outlets.name: Anthropic News
outlets.bias_notes: Official company source; safety-focused framing; PR-managed

outlets.name: Google DeepMind Blog
outlets.bias_notes: Official source; research credibility but corporate-managed

outlets.name: Google AI Blog
outlets.bias_notes: Consumer product focus; corporate communications layer

outlets.name: Microsoft AI Blog
outlets.bias_notes: Product/partnership focus; Microsoft-positive framing

outlets.name: Meta AI Blog
outlets.bias_notes: Open-source AI emphasis; PR-managed; positive framing of social AI

outlets.name: Hugging Face Blog
outlets.bias_notes: Open-source AI community; practitioner focus; trusted technical source

outlets.name: NVIDIA AI Blog
outlets.bias_notes: Hardware/infrastructure focus; company-positive; important for AI infra tracking

outlets.name: Stanford HAI (Human-Centered AI)
outlets.bias_notes: Academic; balanced; annual AI Index is essential reading

outlets.name: Allen Institute for AI (AI2)
outlets.bias_notes: Academic; open-source mission; strong on scientific AI applications

outlets.name: Partnership on AI
outlets.bias_notes: Industry-backed multi-stakeholder body; consensus-building tone

outlets.name: AI Now Institute
outlets.bias_notes: Critical/progressive lens; important counterweight to tech-positive sources

outlets.name: Machine Intelligence Research Institute (MIRI)
outlets.bias_notes: Strong AI risk prior; academic; important for safety-focused monitoring

outlets.name: Future of Life Institute
outlets.bias_notes: AI-risk concerned; high-profile open letters (GPT-4 pause letter); advocacy-oriented

outlets.name: Center for AI Safety
outlets.bias_notes: Safety-focused; issued prominent 2023 extinction risk statement

outlets.name: Center for Human-Compatible AI (CHAI)
outlets.bias_notes: Stuart Russell's group; rigorous academic; AI-risk concerned but constructive

outlets.name: Center for Security and Emerging Technology (CSET)
outlets.bias_notes: Policy/national security focus; Georgetown-backed; balanced but hawkish on China

outlets.name: Brookings Institution - AI
outlets.bias_notes: Center-left think tank; excellent policy analysis

outlets.name: EleutherAI
outlets.bias_notes: Grassroots open-source AI research collective; anti-corporate sentiment sometimes

outlets.name: Semantic Scholar
outlets.bias_notes: Neutral aggregator; API-first; essential for paper tracking

outlets.name: Papers With Code
outlets.bias_notes: Neutral aggregator; reproducibility focus; excellent for SOTA tracking

outlets.name: Import AI (Jack Clark)
outlets.bias_notes: Former OpenAI policy VP; safety-concerned; excellent researcher perspective

outlets.name: The Batch (DeepLearning.AI)
outlets.bias_notes: Andrew Ng's publication; tech-optimist; some corporate adjacent commentary

outlets.name: Exponential View (Azeem Azhar)
outlets.bias_notes: Optimistic-but-nuanced; strong business lens; European perspective

outlets.name: One Useful Thing (Ethan Mollick)
outlets.bias_notes: Wharton professor; empirical but accessible; cautiously optimistic

outlets.name: Stratechery (Ben Thompson)
outlets.bias_notes: Tech-libertarian lean; sharp analysis; significant paywall

outlets.name: Interconnects (Nathan Lambert)
outlets.bias_notes: Former HuggingFace/AI2 researcher; technically deep; trusted on RLHF topics

outlets.name: AI Snake Oil (Arvind Narayanan)
outlets.bias_notes: Critical/skeptical of AI hype; Princeton professor; important counterbalance

outlets.name: Marcus on AI (Gary Marcus)
outlets.bias_notes: Skeptic of deep learning/AGI hype; often contrarian; public intellectual profile

outlets.name: Superhuman AI
outlets.bias_notes: AI-positive; productivity focus; growing audience

outlets.name: Ahead of AI (Sebastian Raschka)
outlets.bias_notes: ML educator; technically accurate; practical lens

outlets.name: Chain of Thought Newsletter
outlets.bias_notes: Emerging publication; balanced tone

outlets.name: AI Alignment Newsletter (Rohin Shah)
outlets.bias_notes: DeepMind researcher; technically rigorous; safety-concerned but constructive

outlets.name: Nikkei Asia - Technology
outlets.bias_notes: Japanese business perspective; strong on hardware/manufacturing

outlets.name: South China Morning Post - Tech
outlets.bias_notes: Hong Kong-based; China-aware but increasingly cautious due to political environment

outlets.name: TechNode
outlets.bias_notes: English-language China tech news; independent editorial stance

outlets.name: The Register (UK)
outlets.bias_notes: Known for dry sarcasm; critical of hype; UK tech perspective

outlets.name: Computer Weekly (UK)
outlets.bias_notes: IT professional audience; UK-centric

outlets.name: Heise Online (Germany)
outlets.bias_notes: German IT press; privacy-conscious framing; GDPR/EU law emphasis

outlets.name: BBC Technology News
outlets.bias_notes: Public broadcaster neutrality; global audience; accessible framing

outlets.name: KrASIA
outlets.bias_notes: Strong APAC coverage; bridges Asian and Western tech narratives

outlets.name: India AI (Govt Initiative)
outlets.bias_notes: Government source; policy-promotional; useful for India AI landscape

outlets.name: AI Singapore
outlets.bias_notes: Government-backed; focused on applied AI; ASEAN perspective

outlets.bias_notes: National AI institute UK; academic credibility; policy-aware

outlets.name: AIMed (Healthcare AI)
outlets.bias_notes: Medical professional audience; cautious framing; FDA/regulatory focus

outlets.name: STAT News - AI Coverage
outlets.bias_notes: Science journalism rigor; covers biotech/pharma AI beats well

outlets.name: Defense One
outlets.bias_notes: Defense establishment perspective; important for AGI governance/military axis

outlets.name: AlgorithmWatch
outlets.bias_notes: Critical/watchdog lens; European base; important for AI ethics coverage

outlets.name: Climate Change AI
outlets.bias_notes: Climate-focused; academic; both AI-for-climate and AI-energy-cost angles

outlets.name: GovAI (Centre for Governance of AI)
outlets.bias_notes: Oxford-based; serious long-term governance focus; influential among policymakers

outlets.name: Distill.pub
outlets.bias_notes: On hiatus but archives essential; highest quality ML visualizations/explainers

outlets.name: Machine Learning Mastery
outlets.bias_notes: Practitioner education focus; minimal opinion; how-to emphasis

outlets.name: EdSurge - AI in Education
outlets.bias_notes: Education sector focus; balanced on AI hype in edtech

outlets.bias_notes: Legal professional audience; practical/compliance focus

outlets.bias_notes: Finance sector focus; industry-friendly

outlets.bias_notes: Industry trade focus; automotive sector bias

outlets.name: Robotics Business Review
outlets.bias_notes: Industry/trade focus; robotics sector

outlets.name: Creative AI Digest (Substack)
outlets.bias_notes: Creative professional audience; enthusiasm for generative art

outlets.name: AI in Pharma (Drug Discovery Today)
outlets.bias_notes: Pharmaceutical/biotech focus; scientific rigor

outlets.name: IEEE Spectrum - Robotics
outlets.bias_notes: Engineering rigor; peer community focus

outlets.name: The Morning Paper (Adrian Colyer)

outlets.name: The Information

outlets.name: Galaxy Brain (Noah Smith / AI lens)

outlets.name: Tech Policy Press
outlets.bias_notes: Policy-focused; critical of tech industry self-regulation

outlets.bias_notes: Social research; non-partisan; polling-based insights on AI public perception

tier_counts.notes: Some outlets span tiers; classified by primary identity

access_methods.rss_only: ~85 outlets have confirmed or standard RSS feeds

metadata.verification_notes: RSS URLs verified against common patterns as of 2026-03-23. Paywalled outlets noted. A subset of RSS feeds should be spot-checked programmatically before ingestion. API endpoints (arXiv, Guardian, Semantic Scholar, PapersWithCode, HuggingFace) are documented and publicly available. Substack feeds follow pattern: [publication].substack.com/feed. BeehiIV feeds follow pattern: [publication].beehiiv.com/feed.
